title: Filter .codeql db artifact paths from SARIF summaries
description: Suppress duplicate findings that originate from CodeQL database mirror artifact URIs under .codeql/db-*/src/... so rcql output reflects source files only.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementing SARIF URI normalization + de-duplication for CodeQL DB mirror artifact paths (/.codeql/db-*/src/...) so output shows canonical source paths once.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Follow-up patch: handled mirror URIs where src segment omits the leading slash (e.g. src/Users/...). Revalidated: full test suite 106 passed; Tactus py/multiple-definition report now 5 findings with .codeql mirror duplicates removed.
